reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar !!!
Hemos concurrido fuera de temporada a conocer el predio
Ampliaré en el verano con respecto a la at nación y servicios que brinden

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place!!!
We visited during the off-season to explore the grounds. I'll provide more details during the summer regarding the facilities and services they offer.

reviews.comment:
Quedó en una zona un poco desolada pero mantiene su aspecto de antaño que le dan un toque particular y vintage

(Translated by Google)
It ended up in a somewhat desolate area but it maintains its old-fashioned appearance, giving it a particular and vintage touch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSbWFHVkVjekpEUlVSamRGcHRiamh4VFZOM2RFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hacemos parada en ese lugar antes de llegar a la Basílica, después de pedalear 150 kms desde La Plata.. cuenta con todos los servicios, baños limpios, el market para abastecerse, agua caliente para el mate y mucho verde para poder descansar un buen rato

(Translated by Google)
We stop there before reaching the Basilica, after cycling 150 km from La Plata. It has all the amenities, clean bathrooms, a market to stock up, hot water for mate, and plenty of greenery to relax for a while.

reviews.comment:
En plena puests en valor de la vieja gasolinera del acá, atendida muy cordialmente por propietarios, con una pequeña zona de descanso

(Translated by Google)
In the midst of the restoration of the old gas station here, very cordially attended by the owners, with a small rest area
